stimulus: Inupiaq sculptor Aaka Niviaq’s ivory carvings range widely in form and scale. In 2008, Niviaq carved a four-inch walrus tusk into an intricate ______blank in 2018, she assembled hundreds of bleached whale bones into a sweeping installation more than thirty feet across, suspended above the floor of a Vancouver gallery.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The convention being tested is the coordination of main clauses within a sentence. A semicolon conventionally joins the first main clause (“In 2008...amulet”) and the second main clause (“in 2018...gallery”).

Choice A is incorrect because, without a conjunction following it, a comma can’t join two main clauses. Choice B is incorrect because the adverb “later” can’t link two main clauses without a coordinator. Choice C is incorrect because it results in a comma splice.
